description: CONUS dominant soil texture class (USDA 12-class system). Pixel value is read from the Red channel after drawing soil_texture.png to a canvas and calling getImageData() — the PNG is an 8-bit indexed image with an identity grayscale palette (palette[v] = [v,v,v]), so the decoded R channel equals the original class value exactly. Verified via round-trip: decoded array matches the source GeoTIFF pixel-for-pixel.

_classes_UNCONFIRMED.note: This is my best guess at the class order, matching the common OpenLandMap / GEE 'Soil texture class (USDA system)' convention. PLEASE CONFIRM against your GEE source asset before this is wired into the app — an incorrect order would silently mis-map FC/WP values nationwide.
